title: When he Mentioned Satan and Sought Refuge from him
alternateName: دُعَاؤُهُ إذا ذُكِرَ الشيطان فَاستَعاذَ مِنهُِ
fullText:
أَللَّهُمَّ إنَّا نَعُوذُ بِكَ

O God, we seek refuge in Thee

مِنْ نَزَغَـاتِ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ وَكَيْدِهِ وَمَكَائِدِهِ،

from the instigations of the accursed Satan, his trickery, and his traps,

وَمِنَ الثِّقَةِ بِأَمَـانِيِّهِ وَمَوَاعِيدِهِ وَغُرُورِهِ وَمَصَائِدِهِ،

from trust in his false hopes, his promises, his delusions, and his snares,

وَأَنْ يُطْمِعَ نَفْسَهُ فِي إضْلاَلِنَا

and lest he should make himself crave to lead us away

عَنْ طَاعَتِكَ وَامْتِهَانِنَا بِمَعْصِيَتِكَ،

from Thy obedience and to degrade us through our disobeying Thee,

أَوْ أَنْ يَحْسُنَ عِنْدَنَا مَا حَسَّنَ لَنَا،

and lest what he has shown us as beautiful be beautiful for us

أَوْ أَنْ يَثْقُلَ عَلَيْنَا مَا كَرَّهَ إلَيْنَا.

and what he has shown us as detestable weigh down upon us.

أللَّهُمَّ اخْسَأْهُ عَنَّا بِعِبَادَتِكَ،

O God, drive him away from us through Thy worship,

وَاكْبِتْهُ بِدُؤوبِنَا فِي مَحَبَّتِكَ،

throw him down through our perseverance in Thy love,

وَاجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَهُ سِتْراً لاَ يَهْتِكُهُ،

and place between him and us a covering that he cannot tear away

وَرَدْماً مُصْمِتاً لا يَفْتُقُهُ.

and a solid barrier that he cannot cut through!

أللَّهُمَّ صَـلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِـهِ،

O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَاشْغَلْهُ عَنَّا بِبَعْضِ أَعْدَائِكَ،

distract Satan from us with some of Thy enemies,

وَاعْصِمْنَا مِنْهُ بِحُسْنِ رِعَايَتِكَ، وَاكْفِنَا خَتْرَهُ،

preserve us from him through Thy good guarding, spare us his treachery,

وَوَلِّنَا ظَهْرَهُ، وَاقْطَعْ عَنَّا إثْرَهُ.

turn his back toward us, and cut off from us his trace!

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ

O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَأَمْتِعْنَا مِنَ الْهُدَى، بِمِثْلِ ضَلاَلَتِهِ،

give us to enjoy guidance the like of his misguidance,

وَزَوِّدْنَا مِنَ التَّقْوَى ضِدَّ غَوَايَتِهِ،

increase us in piety against his seduction,

وَاسْلُكْ بِنَـا مِنَ التُّقى خِـلافَ سَبِيلِهِ مِنَ الـرَّدى.

and make us walk in reverential fear contrary to his path of ruin!

أللَّهُمَّ لاَ تَجْعَلْ لَهُ فِي قُلُوبِنَا مَدْخَلاً

O God, assign him no place of entrance into our hearts

وَلاَ تُوطِنَنَّ لَهُ فِيمَا لَدَيْنَا مَنْزِلاً.

and do not allow him to make his home in that which is with us!

اللَّهُمَّ وَمَا سَوَّلَ لَنَا مِنْ بَاطِل فَعَرِّفْنَاهُ

O God, cause us to recognize the falsehood with which he tempts us,

وَإذَا عَرَّفْتَنَاهُ فَقِنَاهُ، وَبَصِّرْنَا مَا نُكَايِدُهُ بِهِ،

and once Thou hast caused us to recognize it, protect us from it! Make us see what will allow us to outwit him,

وَأَلْهِمْنَا مَا نُعِدُّهُ لَهُ، وَأَيْقِظْنَا عَنْ سِنَةِ الْغَفْلَةِ بِالرُّكُونِ إلَيْهِ

inspire us with all that we can make ready for him, awaken us from the heedless slumber of relying upon him,

وَأَحْسِنْ بِتَوْفِيقِكَ عَوْنَنَا عَلَيْهِ.

and help us well, through Thy giving success, against him!

اللَّهُمَّ وَأَشْرِبْ قُلُوبَنَـا إنْكَارَ عَمَلِهِ،

O God, saturate our hearts with the rejection of his works

وَالْـطُفْ لَنَا فِي نَقضِ حِيَلِهِ.

and be gentle to us by destroying his stratagems!

أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ وَحَوِّلْ سُلْطَانَهُ عَنَّا،

O God, bless Muhammad and his Household, turn his authority away from us,

وَاقْطَعْ رَجَاءَهُ مِنَّا ، وادْرَأْه عَنِ الْوُلُوعِ بِنَا.

cut off his hope from us, and keep him from craving for us!

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ

O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَاجْعَلْ آباءَنَا وَأُمَّهَاتِنَا وَأَوْلاَدَنَا وَأَهَالِينَا

and place our fathers, our mothers, our children, our wives,

وَذَوِي أَرْحَامِنَا وَقَرَابَاتِنَا وَجِيْرَانَنَا

our siblings, our relatives, and the faithful among our neighbours,

مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَـاتِ مِنْهُ فِي حِرْز حَـارِز،

male and female, in a sanctuary impregnable to him,

وَحِصْن حَافِظ ، وَكَهْف مَانِع، وَألْبِسْهُمْ مِنْهُ جُنَناً وَاقِيَةً،

a guarding fortress, a defending cave! Clothe them in shields protective against him

وَأَعْطِهِمْ عَلَيْهِ أَسْلِحَةً مَاضِيَةً

and give them arms that will cut him down!

أللَّهُمَّ وَاعْمُمْ بِذلِكَ مَنْ شَهِدَ لَكَ بِالرُّبُوبِيَّةِ،

O God, include in that everyone who witnesses to Thee as Lord,

وَأَخْلَصَ لَكَ بِالْوَحْدَانِيَّةِ،

devotes himself sincerely to Thy Unity,

وَعَادَاهُ لَكَ بِحَقِيقَةِ الْعُبُودِيَّة،

shows enmity toward him through the reality of servanthood,

وَاسْتَظْهَرَ بِكَ عَلَيْهِ فِي مَعْرِفَةِ الْعُلُومِ الرَّبَّانِيَّةِ.

and seeks help from Thee against him through knowledge of the divine sciences!

اللَّهُمَّ احْلُلْ مَا عَقَدَ، وَافْتقْ مَا رَتَقَ،

O God, undo what he ties, unstitch what he sews up,

وَافسَخ مَا دَبَّرَ، وَثَبِّطْهُ إذَا عَزَمَ، وَانْقُضْ مَا أَبْرَمَ.

dislocate what he devises, frustrate him when he makes up his mind, and destroy what he establishes!

اللَّهُمَّ وَاهْزِمْ جُنْدَهُ وَأَبْطِلْ كَيْدَهُ

O God, rout his troops, nullify his trickery,

وَاهْدِمْ كَهْفَهُ وَأَرْغِمْ أَنْفَهُ.

make his cave collapse, and rub his nose in the ground!

اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنَا فِي نَظْم أَعْدَآئِهِ

O God, place us in the ranks of his enemies

وَاعْزِلْنَا عَنْ عِدَادِ أَوْلِيَائِهِ،

and remove us from the number of his friends,

لا نُطِيعُ لَهُ إذَا اسْتَهْوَانَا،

that we obey him not when he entices us

وَلا نَسْتَجِيبُ لَهُ إذَا دَعَانَا

and answer him not when he calls to us!

نَأْمُرُ بِمُنَاوَاتِهِ مَنْ أَطَاعَ أَمْرَنَا

We command everyone who obeys our command to be his enemy

وَنَعِظُ عَنْ مُتَابَعَتِهِ مَنِ اتَّبَعَ زَجْرَنَا.

and we admonish everyone who follows our prohibition not to follow him!

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّينَ وَسَيِّدِ الْمُرْسَلِينَ

O God, bless Muhammad the Seal of the prophets and lord of the emissaries,

وَعَلَى أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ الطَّيِّبِينَ الـطَّاهِرِينَ

and the folk of his house, the good, the pure!

وَأَعِذْنَا وَأَهَـالِينَا وَإخْـوَانَنَا

Give refuge to us, our families, our brothers,

وَجَمِيـعَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ مِمَّا اسْتَعَذْنَا مِنْهُ،

and all the faithful, male and female, from that from which we seek refuge,

وَأَجِرْنَا مِمَّا اسْتَجَرْنَا بِكَ مِنْ خَوْفِهِ

and grant us sanctuary from that through fear of which we seek sanctuary in Thee!

وَاسْمَعْ لَنَا مَا دَعَوْنَا بِهِ وَأَعْطِنَا مَا أَغْفَلْنَاهُ وَاحْفَظْ لَنَا مَا نَسِيْنَاهُ،

Hear our supplication to Thee, bestow upon us that of which we have been heedless, and safeguard for us what we have forgotten!

وَصَيِّرْنَا بِذَلِكَ فِي دَرَجَاتِ الصَّالِحِينَ

Through all this bring us into the ranks of the righteous

وَمَـرَاتِبِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ

and the degrees of the faithful!

آمينَ رَبَّ ا لْعَالَمِينَ .

Amen, Lord of the worlds!

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّينَ وَسَيِّدِ الْمُرْسَلِينَ
O God, bless Muhammad the Seal of the prophets and lord of the emissaries,
وَعَلَى أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ الطَّيِّبِينَ الـطَّاهِرِينَ
and the folk of his house, the good, the pure!
وَأَعِذْنَا وَأَهَـالِينَا وَإخْـوَانَنَا
Give refuge to us, our families, our brothers,
وَجَمِيـعَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ مِمَّا اسْتَعَذْنَا مِنْهُ،
and all the faithful, male and female, from that from which we seek refuge,
وَأَجِرْنَا مِمَّا اسْتَجَرْنَا بِكَ مِنْ خَوْفِهِ
and grant us sanctuary from that through fear of which we seek sanctuary in Thee!
وَاسْمَعْ لَنَا مَا دَعَوْنَا بِهِ وَأَعْطِنَا مَا أَغْفَلْنَاهُ وَاحْفَظْ لَنَا مَا نَسِيْنَاهُ،
Hear our supplication to Thee, bestow upon us that of which we have been heedless, and safeguard for us what we have forgotten!
وَصَيِّرْنَا بِذَلِكَ فِي دَرَجَاتِ الصَّالِحِينَ
Through all this bring us into the ranks of the righteous
وَمَـرَاتِبِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
and the degrees of the faithful!
آمينَ رَبَّ ا لْعَالَمِينَ .
Amen, Lord of the worlds!

translations.text: O God, we seek refuge in Thee

pairs.arabic: مِنْ نَزَغَـاتِ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ وَكَيْدِهِ وَمَكَائِدِهِ،

translations.text: from the instigations of the accursed Satan, his trickery, and his traps,

pairs.arabic: وَمِنَ الثِّقَةِ بِأَمَـانِيِّهِ وَمَوَاعِيدِهِ وَغُرُورِهِ وَمَصَائِدِهِ،

translations.text: from trust in his false hopes, his promises, his delusions, and his snares,
and lest he should make himself crave to lead us away
from Thy obedience and to degrade us through our disobeying Thee,

pairs.arabic: أَوْ أَنْ يَحْسُنَ عِنْدَنَا مَا حَسَّنَ لَنَا،

translations.text: and lest what he has shown us as beautiful be beautiful for us

pairs.arabic: أَوْ أَنْ يَثْقُلَ عَلَيْنَا مَا كَرَّهَ إلَيْنَا.

translations.text: and what he has shown us as detestable weigh down upon us.
O God, drive him away from us through Thy worship,
throw him down through our perseverance in Thy love,

pairs.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَهُ سِتْراً لاَ يَهْتِكُهُ،

translations.text: and place between him and us a covering that he cannot tear away
and a solid barrier that he cannot cut through!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
distract Satan from us with some of Thy enemies,

pairs.arabic: وَاعْصِمْنَا مِنْهُ بِحُسْنِ رِعَايَتِكَ، وَاكْفِنَا خَتْرَهُ،

translations.text: preserve us from him through Thy good guarding, spare us his treachery,
turn his back toward us, and cut off from us his trace!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
give us to enjoy guidance the like of his misguidance,
increase us in piety against his seduction,

pairs.arabic: وَاسْلُكْ بِنَـا مِنَ التُّقى خِـلافَ سَبِيلِهِ مِنَ الـرَّدى.

translations.text: and make us walk in reverential fear contrary to his path of ruin!

pairs.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ لاَ تَجْعَلْ لَهُ فِي قُلُوبِنَا مَدْخَلاً

translations.text: O God, assign him no place of entrance into our hearts

pairs.arabic: وَلاَ تُوطِنَنَّ لَهُ فِيمَا لَدَيْنَا مَنْزِلاً.

translations.text: and do not allow him to make his home in that which is with us!

pairs.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَمَا سَوَّلَ لَنَا مِنْ بَاطِل فَعَرِّفْنَاهُ

translations.text: O God, cause us to recognize the falsehood with which he tempts us,

pairs.arabic: وَإذَا عَرَّفْتَنَاهُ فَقِنَاهُ، وَبَصِّرْنَا مَا نُكَايِدُهُ بِهِ،

translations.text: and once Thou hast caused us to recognize it, protect us from it! Make us see what will allow us to outwit him,

pairs.arabic: وَأَلْهِمْنَا مَا نُعِدُّهُ لَهُ، وَأَيْقِظْنَا عَنْ سِنَةِ الْغَفْلَةِ بِالرُّكُونِ إلَيْهِ

translations.text: inspire us with all that we can make ready for him, awaken us from the heedless slumber of relying upon him,
and help us well, through Thy giving success, against him!
O God, saturate our hearts with the rejection of his works
and be gentle to us by destroying his stratagems!

pairs.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ وَحَوِّلْ سُلْطَانَهُ عَنَّا،

translations.text: O God, bless Muhammad and his Household, turn his authority away from us,

pairs.arabic: وَاقْطَعْ رَجَاءَهُ مِنَّا ، وادْرَأْه عَنِ الْوُلُوعِ بِنَا.

translations.text: cut off his hope from us, and keep him from craving for us!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
and place our fathers, our mothers, our children, our wives,
our siblings, our relatives, and the faithful among our neighbours,

pairs.arabic: مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَـاتِ مِنْهُ فِي حِرْز حَـارِز،

translations.text: male and female, in a sanctuary impregnable to him,

pairs.arabic: وَحِصْن حَافِظ ، وَكَهْف مَانِع، وَألْبِسْهُمْ مِنْهُ جُنَناً وَاقِيَةً،

translations.text: a guarding fortress, a defending cave! Clothe them in shields protective against him
and give them arms that will cut him down!

pairs.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ وَاعْمُمْ بِذلِكَ مَنْ شَهِدَ لَكَ بِالرُّبُوبِيَّةِ،

translations.text: O God, include in that everyone who witnesses to Thee as Lord,
devotes himself sincerely to Thy Unity,
shows enmity toward him through the reality of servanthood,

pairs.arabic: وَاسْتَظْهَرَ بِكَ عَلَيْهِ فِي مَعْرِفَةِ الْعُلُومِ الرَّبَّانِيَّةِ.

translations.text: and seeks help from Thee against him through knowledge of the divine sciences!

pairs.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ احْلُلْ مَا عَقَدَ، وَافْتقْ مَا رَتَقَ،

translations.text: O God, undo what he ties, unstitch what he sews up,

pairs.arabic: وَافسَخ مَا دَبَّرَ، وَثَبِّطْهُ إذَا عَزَمَ، وَانْقُضْ مَا أَبْرَمَ.

translations.text: dislocate what he devises, frustrate him when he makes up his mind, and destroy what he establishes!
O God, rout his troops, nullify his trickery,
make his cave collapse, and rub his nose in the ground!
O God, place us in the ranks of his enemies
and remove us from the number of his friends,
that we obey him not when he entices us
and answer him not when he calls to us!
We command everyone who obeys our command to be his enemy

pairs.arabic: وَنَعِظُ عَنْ مُتَابَعَتِهِ مَنِ اتَّبَعَ زَجْرَنَا.

translations.text: and we admonish everyone who follows our prohibition not to follow him!

pairs.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّينَ وَسَيِّدِ الْمُرْسَلِينَ

translations.text: O God, bless Muhammad the Seal of the prophets and lord of the emissaries,
and the folk of his house, the good, the pure!
Give refuge to us, our families, our brothers,

pairs.arabic: وَجَمِيـعَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ مِمَّا اسْتَعَذْنَا مِنْهُ،

translations.text: and all the faithful, male and female, from that from which we seek refuge,

pairs.arabic: وَأَجِرْنَا مِمَّا اسْتَجَرْنَا بِكَ مِنْ خَوْفِهِ

translations.text: and grant us sanctuary from that through fear of which we seek sanctuary in Thee!

pairs.arabic: وَاسْمَعْ لَنَا مَا دَعَوْنَا بِهِ وَأَعْطِنَا مَا أَغْفَلْنَاهُ وَاحْفَظْ لَنَا مَا نَسِيْنَاهُ،

translations.text: Hear our supplication to Thee, bestow upon us that of which we have been heedless, and safeguard for us what we have forgotten!
Through all this bring us into the ranks of the righteous
and the degrees of the faithful!
Amen, Lord of the worlds!
